title: BEM-868 verify all markers
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
needles = ['BEM-867 completed', 'BEM-868 | Dispatch channel recovered', 'APPROVED_WITH_NOTES', 'Next: continue roadmap from AGENT_CONTEXT.md']
status = 'CONTEXT_SYNCED' if all(n in text for n in needles) else 'CONTEXT_INCOMPLETE'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM868_VERIFY_ALL_MARKERS_FINAL_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-868 verify all markers final\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + n + ': ' + str(n in text) for n in needles) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM868 verify all markers final: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
